title: After the Hanshin J.F.: Still Sprouting

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I lost the Hanshin Juvenile Fillies. I wasn't able to
show off a grand victory to Trainer like I'd
planned...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But the audience is impressed by how hard I tried,
and even praise me! My performance seems to
give Trainer some more confidence, too.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Seeing Trainer smile makes me wonder if it was
actually important that we met now, instead of
later...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
If that's the case... I really want to bring home a
victory for Trainer. Next up, I'm taking on the
Oka Sho on the Tiara tour!
